recommendations.title: Beyond the Mask
recommendations.overview: A former assassin tries to redeem himself by becoming a masked highwayman in Colonial America.

recommendations.title: White Wedding
recommendations.overview: A philosophy professor has an illicit affair with one of his students, a bright yet troubled girl who lives alone.

recommendations.title: The Acid House
recommendations.overview: A surreal triptych adapted by "Trainspotting" author Irvine Welsh from his acclaimed collection of short stories. Combining a vicious sense of humor with hard-talking drama, the film reaches into the hearts and minds of the chemical generation, casti

recommendations.title: Caramelo
recommendations.overview: After a life-changing diagnosis, a promising chef finds hope and humor with the help of a fur-midable dog friend.

recommendations.title: The Lover
recommendations.overview: A poor French teenage girl engages in an illicit affair with a wealthy Chinese heir in 1920s Saigon. For the first time in her young life she has control, and she wields it deftly over her besotted lover throughout a series of clandestine meetings an

recommendations.title: Wild Things: Foursome
recommendations.overview: A murdered hotel millionaire's son finds himself tangled up in a game of seduction and murder after a raunchy night with three beautiful women.

recommendations.title: Wild at Heart
recommendations.overview: Young lovers Sailor and Lula hit the road to start a new life together away from the wrath of Lula’s deranged, disapproving mother, who has hired a team of hitmen to cut the lovers’ surreal honeymoon short.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: Roma
recommendations.overview: In 1970s Mexico City, two domestic workers help a mother of four while her husband is away for an extended period of time.

recommendations.title: Nineties
recommendations.overview: Scandalously famous collections of short Italian comedies of the 90s! All that was "fun" in those years in Italy - all here! The sea of black humor on all issues - sex, politics, mafia, crime, TV...
